title: To name the Department of Veterans Affairs community-based outpatient clinic in Lubbock, Texas, as the "General Bernie Mittemeyer VA Clinic".
plain_summary: This bill changes the name of a veterans medical clinic in Lubbock, Texas. The clinic will now be called the General Bernie Mittemeyer VA Clinic to honor General Bernie Mittemeyer. All official government papers and documents must use this new name when talking about the clinic. The clinic provides medical care to veterans who live in the area.
last_action_text: Referred to the Subcommittee on Health.

sections.title: Section 1  Name of Department of Veterans Affairs Community-Based Outpatient Clinic, Lubbock, Texas
sections.text: The Department of Veterans Affairs has a medical clinic in Lubbock, Texas that provides healthcare services to veterans who do not need to stay overnight in a hospital. This clinic is called a community-based outpatient clinic. After this law is passed, this clinic will be renamed the General Bernie Mittemeyer VA Clinic. From that point forward, whenever any government law, rule, map, document, record, or other official paper mentions this clinic, it must use the new name General Bernie Mittemeyer VA Clinic.
